SEARCH
Package ru.tehkode.utils

Class StringUtils

java.lang.Object
ru.tehkode.utils.StringUtils
public class StringUtils extends Object
General-purpose string manipulation utilities used by PermissionsEx.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StringUtils()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    implode(String[] array, String separator)
    Returns the given array joined by a separator.
    static String
    implode(List<?> list, String separator)
    Returns the elements joined by a separator.
    static String
    readStream(InputStream is)
    Reads an input stream's complete contents as a UTF-8 string.
    static String
    repeat(String str, int times)
    Repeats a string a given number of times.
    static int
    toInteger(String value, int defaultValue)
    Parses a string to an integer value, returning a default on failure.

  • Constructor Details

    • StringUtils

      public StringUtils()

  • Method Details

    • implode

      public static String implode(String[] array, String separator)
      Returns the given array joined by a separator.
      Parameters:
      array - an array of strings to join; must not be null
      separator - a string to insert between the array elements; must not be null
      Returns:
      the joined string, or an empty string when array is empty

    • implode

      public static String implode(List<?> list, String separator)
      Returns the elements joined by a separator.
      Parameters:
      list - a list of objects to join; must not be null
      separator - a string to insert between the list elements; must not be null
      Returns:
      the joined string, or an empty string when list is empty

    • readStream

      public static String readStream(InputStream is) throws IOException
      Reads an input stream's complete contents as a UTF-8 string.

      The stream is closed after reading, including when an I/O error occurs.

      Parameters:
      is - an input stream to read from; may be null
      Returns:
      the full string content, or null if is is null
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading from the stream fails

    • repeat

      public static String repeat(String str, int times)
      Repeats a string a given number of times.
      Parameters:
      str - the string to repeat; must not be null
      times - the number of repetitions; must be non-negative
      Returns:
      the concatenated result

    • toInteger

      public static int toInteger(String value, int defaultValue)
      Parses a string to an integer value, returning a default on failure.
      Parameters:
      value - a string to parse to an int; may be null
      defaultValue - the value returned when value is not a valid integer
      Returns:
      the parsed integer, or defaultValue on parse failure
